rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF BRUNO L. ROSELLI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #11, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/4/21 to follow hearing in the related estate (appointment of personal representative). Original statements just filed on 3/3/21 were not yet in the Confidential file. The date of any order authorizing fees must be set forth on the disbursements schedule. [CRC 7.575(e)(2)(C).] See Judicial Council forms GC-400(PH)(1) and GC-400(C)(4).] A reconciliation must be shown for any difference between the ending balance of cash on hand and the bank statement. At least 1.5 hours of attorney time appears to have been in connection with the estate (locating a will), not this conservatorship. The filing fee for this petition was $435, not $450.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JAMES FREDERICK DAUGHERTY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/13/2021. 1) Notice of the hearing must be on the current version of a Judicial Council DE-120 form. 2) Is notice to any public entity under Probate Code section 9201 required? 3) Has the petitioner taken any IAEA action reportable under CRC 7.250? 4) Paragraph 4 of the petition refers to a copy of the letter from the Franchise Tax Board attached and filed with the Court on 06/25/2019, but no copy was attached to the document filed on that date. 5) No partial inventory and appraisal has been filed to report the cash and right to receive oil lease payments described in paragraph 11 of the petition. 6) Paragraph 16 of the petition does not state whether any heir has previously been confined. See Probate Code section 9202(b).

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF STEPHEN J. OUTLAW
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Return Of Property To The Estate Pursuant To California Probate Code ?850 And For An Order Finding Financial And Physical Elder Abuse Pursuant To Welfare And Institutions Code 15610 Et Seq
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Petitioner requests return of assets to the estate; however, it appears that she was the one who held the asset and authorized Respondent to use it. 2) Objection was only signed by counsel. A verified declaration in support of the objection was filed by Jose Hernandez but nothing has been filed by Enna Escalante. 3) Judicial Council Form DE-115 was not used to provide notice of hearing (3/1/21 filing), and required information was not contained therein. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order. rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JASHVANT M. PATEL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/13/2021. 1) The petition caption requests letters of administration, even though the decedent died testate. The petition must be amended, and the original will must be filed. 2) No DE-121 form is on file. 3) No DE-147 form is on file. 4) No DE-147S form is on file. This form must be filed conventionally with a pleading cover sheet attached (cannot be e-filed). 5) No proof of publication is on file. 6) Item 2c of the petition requests full IAEA authority, but the relief was not requested in the petition caption. 7) Item 5a(3) or (4) must be checked. 8) Item 5a(7) or (8) must be checked. 9) Item 5b must be completed. 10) Item 8 must identify the currently acting trustee of the devisee trust. If the petitioner is the sole trustee, all beneficiaries within the meaning of Probate Code section 1208(b) must be identified.

Courtesy copies of the petition and proof of service and a proposed order must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 4/2/21 to avoid another continuance. rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CEASAR A. RIBEIRO 2003 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court to determine if Victoria Noon should be appointed as the successor trustee of the Ceasar A. Ribeiro 2003 Trust, although she did not disclose in her verified supplement filed on 2/16/21 the addresses of her aunt and uncle. Notice was mailed to William H. Ribeiro and Anne Ribeiro but their addresses were never verified. Due to the COVID-19 emergency, counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review the 9th amended general order on the courtâs website for information on appearing remotely. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 875 8017 7925 and password is 722809. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE BYRON FLANDERS & GAYLE FLANDERS REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Hearing issues have been e-mailed to counsel. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review the Court's 9th Amended General Order which took effect on 02/10/2021 for more information.
